Title: Merry Goat Round
Description: Merry Goat Round is our best-selling retail cheese for good reason. Actually, quite a few reasons. The super creamy texture. The oh-so-clean flavor. And that rind? It’s soft and bloomy and is edible at any stage of ripening. (Little secret: the fullest flavor is concentrated in the rind. You’re welcome.) Chefs and caterers agree, this one deserves a giant ‘round’ of applause.

Title: Cabra LaMancha
Description:
Inspired by cheeses produced high in the Pyrenees mountains of northern Spain’s Basque region. As they age for 90 days, our cheese makers hand wash, dry brush, and flip each one of these brined orange beauties over and over again until they’re ready. Bello!

Product ships in a 1/2 lb wedge.

Title: FireFly Cheese Club
Description:
Each month’s box includes three cheeses from FireFly Farms and other producers, along with pairings (jams, nuts, dried fruit) and crackers. Past months have featured our Merry Goat Round, a wedge of Cabra la Mancha, Thomasville Tomme, a sweet piece of real honeycomb, lime and saffron almonds, and olive oil crisps.

December’s subscription box included a wedge of spiced cranberry cheese, spruce tip jelly, gingerbread, vanilla rum cashews, and more!

More than just a subscription, joining our cheese club comes with member perks like:

  • Exclusive products not otherwise available for purchase
  • Member Appreciation Month (20% off sitewide)
  • Your very own cheese notebook, where you can take notes on all your favorite cheeses and pairings
  • Member merch, like t-shirts and stickers
  • Pairing suggestions and information about producers we feature

And yes, you can purchase a Cheese Club membership as a gift! Your recipient will get all the benefits of membership, as well as the ability to manage shipping dates and access their subscription account.

Ships free to the continental U.S. Cancel any time by logging into your account or by emailing shop@fireflyfarms.com with your request.

Title: Black & Blue
Description:
When it comes to beautiful blues, goats are the new cows. Well, not quite, but the playing field has been leveled. Black & Blue’s dense, buttery, and stark white interior is as gorgeous to look at as it is to savor—with exactly the right amount of sweetness, making it appealing to just about any level of blue cheese fan.

Product ships in a 1/2lb wedge

Title: Merry Goat Round Spruce Reserve
Description: Next time you’re in a forest full of spruce trees, take a long, deep breath. That’s the subtle aroma you’ll get from this spoonable, spreadable, spruce-bark wrapped softie that’s aged and aromatic.

Title: Fresh Goat Cheese
Description: This creamy superstar is made from milk sourced from local farms. Always. Processed within 24 hours. Always. (Yes, we’re that fresh-obsessed.) No“goaty-funky-ness.” Just a clean, mild flavor with a bright, citrus-y personality. Always.

Title: Bloomy Breeze
Description: A perfect blend of fresh milk from Jersey and Holstein cows makes for a rich, luscious, soft-ripened favorite. Aged carefully for three weeks, then wrapped for soft-ripening over the course of the next few weeks — from the rind inward! Its edible rind is velvety white and bloomy. Hence the name. And the widespread adoration.

Title: Mountain Top
Description: Creamy, mild and rich, MountainTop is one of our most innovative cheeses. This cheese takes the classic pyramid Valençay shape, yet uses blue as a ripening agent instead of the traditional ash. This is our single-most awarded cheese, and we couldn’t be prouder.

Title: Cave Dweller
Description:
You can’t rush something this good. It takes our Cave Dweller eight-to-twelve months to develop its sweet and sharp flavor. Made in the “Italian style,” the curd is “cooked” and stirred in its whey, making it first denser and harder then nuttier and more complex with each passing day.

Product ships in a 1/2lb wedge

Title: Carpenter's Wheel
Description:
We make this one-of-a-kind hard goat cheese in partnership with Murray’s Cheese in New York (original production goes back to the now-closed Crown Finish Caves in Brooklyn). Here in the creamery, we cook the curd in its own whey, and then let it form in our largest molds. Murray’s ages the huge wheels in their own caves, where the flavor ripens and becomes nuttier with each passing day. The barn quilt label honors the terroir of our region and the red barn where FireFly Farms began.

Product ships in a 1/2lb wedge

Title: FireFly Farms Christmas Sampler
Description:
When the winter holidays come around, you know you want a little extra in the fridge, something tasty in your cheese drawer, and delicious foods to treat your guests with. FireFly Farms has you covered with this holiday sampler, which features our Merry Goat Round Spruce Reserve, a wedge of hearty Carpenter’s Wheel, Alaskan spruce tip jelly, Loukanika salami from Driftless Provisions, Potter’s winter wheat crackers, chocolate orange cardamom almonds, and a mini gingerbread cookies from rustic bakery. Go ahead, treat yourself! (Also makes a wonderful gift).

FedEx overnight delivery by 12/23 (order by 12/21). Order by Friday, December 26th, 11:59pm EST to ensure delivery by January 1.

Ingredients: FireFly Farms Cheeses (Pasteurized Goat Milk, Salt, Enzymes, Calcium Chloride, Cheese Cultures), Alaskan Spruce Tip Jelly (Spruce Tip Infusion [Water, Spruce Tips], Sugar, Pectin), Loukanika Salami (Humanely raised pork, Salt, Dextrose, Garlic, Cumin, Orange Zest, Swiss Chard Powder, Lactic Acid Starter Culture), Potter’s Winter Wheat Crackers (Wheat Flour, Water, Canola Oil, Cracked Wheat, Cane Sugar, Salt, Baking Powder [Corn Starch, Sodium Bicarbonate, Monocalcium Phosphate], and Black Pepper), Chocolate Orange Cardamom Almonds (Almonds, Stone ground organic dark chocolate, raw organic cane sugar, fresh orange peel, and ground cardamom), Rustic Bakery Gingerbread Cookies (Unbleached Enriched Wheat Flour [wheat flour, niacin, reduced iron, thiamine, mononitrate, riboflavin, folic acid, enzyme], Butter [cream, natural flavors], Organic Powdered Sugar [organic sugar, organic corn starch], Cane Sugar, Non-GMO Molasses, Eggs [eggs, citric acid], non-GMO Glucose Syrup, Whole Milk, Spices, Cocoa Powder, Sea Salt, Baking Soda).

Title: Barely Blue — sampler box
Description:
Mountain Top is an innovative pyramid-shaped goat’s milk cheese with a light dusting of blue and white mold and a mild, nutty interior. White Rock, more like a young cheddar, is the sister cheese, made from the extra curd when we cut Mountain Top to size and aged separately so it never develops surface mold. Between the two you can enjoy the products of two different cheesemaking methods and celebrate our commitment to keeping waste to a minimum. In this sampler we’ve also included a Blueberry Sumac jam from BRINS and Firehook Sea Salted Crackers. Delightful with a mineral white wine.

1 6-oz MT ~ 1 8-oz White Rock ~ 1 BRINS Blueberry Sumac Jam ~ Cradoc’s Sea Salted Crackers

Due to the seasonal nature of milk production and the small producers we work with, product availability may change. We will make every effort to inform our customers of changes and to substitute high quality products if certain items are not available. If you have any questions about your order, please contact us.

Title: Moo & Blue
Description:
With the deep buttery richness of a classic blue cheese, our all cow’s milk blue isn’t bitter like many blue cheeses can be. There’s a lingering sweetness there and a notably clean flavor. Aged for at least 4 months, it may be unique, but it’s still true blue.

Product ships in a 1/2lb wedge.

Title: Mother's Day Gift Box
Description:
Mom will be overjoyed to open this flower-themed box full of spring goodness! Two FireFly cheeses and a lovely hard cheese called Seven Sisters from the Farm at Doe Run are paired with lavender rhubarb preserves, lavender rose dark chocolate, flower crackers, and your gift message handwritten on a plantable lavender card! This sampler sells out fast, so place your order now, and we’ll ship it to mom just in time for Mother’s Day on May 11.
______________________________________________
  • FireFly Farms Fresh Goat Cheese ~ FireFly Farms Bloomy Breeze  ~  ~ 1/4lb Seven Sisters (The Farm at Doe Run) ~ Girl Meets Dirt Rhubarb Lavender Spoon Preserves ~ Spring & Mulberry Lavender Rose Date Sweetened Fine Chocolate with Bee Pollen ~ Flouwer Crackers ~ Plantable Lavender Wildseed Card in Glassine Sleeve
  • Wrapping not as pictured. Order by Tuesday, May 6, 11:59pm EST to ensure delivery by Mother’s Day, 05/11. 
  • If one of the items in the collection is unavailable or does not meet our standards, we may substitute an item of equal or greater value.

Title: All Goat
Description:
All our goat cheeses in one box! Cabra LaMancha, Cave Dweller, MountainTop, Spruce Reserve, Merry Goat Round, White Rock, Fresh Goat Cheese, and Black & Blue. For those who know what they love and want to share it.

1/2lb Cabra LaMancha ~ 1/2lb Cave Dweller ~ 1 Merry Goat Round ~ ~ 1 Merry Goat Round Spruce Reserve ~ 1/2lb White Rock ~ 1/2lb Black & Blue ~ 1 log Fresh Goat Cheese ~ 1 MountainTop

Due to the seasonal nature of milk production and the small producers we work with, product availability may change. We will make every effort to inform our customers of changes and to substitute high quality products if certain items are not available. If you have any questions about your order, please contact us.

Title: White Rock
Description: A mild aged goat cheese with a gorgeous texture and delicate flavor, that’s crumbly, melty, and creamy all at the same time. The sister cheese to our Mountain Top.

Title: All Spruced Up — sampler box
Description:
Our award-winning Merry Goat Round Spruce Reserve is wrapped in spruce bark and then aged until it’s creamy and fragrant. There’s surely nothing better than slicing off the top of one of these wheels, breathing in the smell of spruce, and scooping out the inside using crusty bread or crackers. This box features two of our award-winning Spruce Reserve wheels and Firehook Sea Salted Crackers, along with a jar of local honey. Champagne recommended, but not included.

2 Merry Goat Round Spruce Reserve ~ 1 16-oz Bearded Bee honey ~ Firehook Sea Salted Crackers

Due to the seasonal nature of milk production and the small producers we work with, product availability may change. We will make every effort to inform our customers of changes and to substitute high quality products if certain items are not available. If you have any questions about your order, please contact us.

Title: Taste of Fall
Description:
It’s the taste of fall! Nutty aged goat cheese (FireFly Farms Cave Dweller), mouthwatering creamy brie (FireFly Farms Bloomy Breeze), local pesticide-free pear butter from our neighbors at Deep Creek Cellars, and some cranberry  crisps to serve.

1 mini wheel FireFly Farms Bloomy Breeze ~ 1/2 lb FireFly Farms Cave Dweller ~ 1 Deep Creek Cellars Pear Butter ~ 1 Maine Crisp Cranberry Almond Buckwheat Crackers

Title: Honey honey — sampler box
Description:
Our washed rind Cabra LaMancha pairs perfectly with local Bearded Bee wildflower honey. Try with a hearty stout or porter (not included) for a match made in heaven!

1 LB CLM ~ 16-oz Bearded Bee honey ~ Firehook Sea Salted Crackers

Due to the seasonal nature of milk production and the small producers we work with, product availability may change. We will make every effort to inform our customers of changes and to substitute high quality products if certain items are not available. If you have any questions about your order, please contact us.

Title: The Heritage Sampler
Description:
Initially begun as a partnership with Crown Finish Caves, and re-launched in 2023 with Murray’s Cheese, our cave-aged Carpenter’s Wheel is well on its way to becoming an American classic. We craft heavy pure goat’s milk wheels at our creamery and then send them to Long Island City, NY to age for a minimum of 6-months in Murray’s Caves. Nutty, caramelly, and full of Appalachian terroir, Carpenter’s Wheel shines as an example of crossing the rural-urban divide. Add in some maple bourbon apple butter from Frog Hollow Farmstead, and you’ve got a pairing that’s both elevated and simple. Also includes Firehook crackers.

1/2lb Carpenter’s Wheel ~ Frog Hollow Farmstead Maple Bourbon Apple Butter ~ Firehook sea salt crackers

Due to the seasonal nature of milk production and the small producers we work with, product availability may change. We will make every effort to inform our customers of changes and to substitute high quality products if certain items are not available. If you have any questions about your order, please contact us.

Title: Wensleydale with Cranberry
Description:
Creamy Wensleydale is one of England’s oldest cheeses, first made there after the Norman invasion, when French monks from the Roquefort region were brought over to practice their cheese-making skills. The Wensleydale pastures give the cheese the unique, refreshing flavor for which it is renowned. This festive version of Wensleydale, handmade in North Yorkshire, is speckled with cranberries. The tart fruit pairs very well with the natural sweet acidity of the cheese.

One 5oz wedge

Title: Red Leicester
Description:
Sparkenhoe’s Red Leicester is the only handmade raw cow’s milk Leicester, made in the UK using traditional methods. It’s bound in muslin cloth and matured for six months on beech wood shelves. This cheese is creamy and nutty, with a sweet, citrus finish.

1/4 lb wedge.

Title: Cow's Milk Sampler
Description:
This sampler features our two award-winning cow’s milk cheeses, Moo & Blue and Bloomy Breeze, paired with sweet dried apricots and Marcona almonds. Also includes Cradoc’s Sea Salted Crackers from Wales.

 

Image shown is a serving suggestion. Sampler includes products  listed below:

1/2lb Moo & Blue ~ 1 Mini Bloomy Breeze ~ 6oz Dried Apricots ~ 6oz Marcona Almonds ~ Cradoc’s Sea Salted Crackers

 

Due to the seasonal nature of milk production and the small producers we work with, product availability may change. We will make every effort to inform our customers of changes and to substitute high quality products if certain items are not available. If you have any questions about your order, please contact us.

Title: Cabrita
Description: A soft ripened goat cheese inspired by the French crottin, this limited edition run of Cabrita is soft and pillowy with a delicate rind and spreadable, delicious paste. Enjoy on a fresh baguette with summer berries! Only available through June 1.

Title: Flouwer Co. Artisanal Crackers
Description: These are some of our favorite crackers, and they work with all of our cheeses. Flouwer Co. handcrafts all natural, plant-based, artisanal crackers with edible flowers and fresh herbs! This colorful cracker is full of edible flowers as well as garden herbs like woody rosemary, fresh dill, and a burst of chive. Well deserving of space on any charcuterie board.

Title: FireFly Sampler
Description:
Monger’s choice! Six FireFly cheeses in one box. This box is the perfect introduction to our award-winning selection. We hand-pick the cheeses based on availability and what’s looking the best on the shelf. Due to the seasonal nature of milk production and the small producers we work with, product availability changes (unfortunately, this makes it impossible for us to honor requests for this particular sampler).

If you have any questions about your order, please contact us.

Title: Jumping Jack
Description:
For a limited time, we brought back a cheese we haven’t made in years: Jumping Jack! This is a mild, semi-hard goat cheese with a dusty orange and white rind, reminiscent of the Tommes made high up in the Basque Pyrenees. If you like Cabra LaMancha or Carpenter’s Wheel, you’re sure to love Jumping Jack.

1/2lb Jumping Jack

Title: Parra Jimenez Organic Manchego
Description:
This is a true farmstead Queso Manchego aged for a minimum 3 months, made from milk produced by heritage breed black ewes that graze the certified-organic Parra Family vineyard in La Mancha, central Spain. The cheese is semi-firm, with exceptionally high moisture content giving it a creamy mouth feel despite its slightly crumbly profile. The cheese has a zesty, buttery, lanolin scent. Its flavor is nutty, herbaceous, sweet and savory with a slight saltiness. This semi-cured Manchego is moister, more complex, sweeter and less salty than factory-made Manchegos.

The Parra family has lived on and worked the land in La Mancha for generations. The word parra, actually means “stalk” in Spanish and given the local tradition of naming people after their professions, family legend has it that their ancestors cultivated vineyards back in the distant past. Parra Family Organic was founded in 1993 by three brothers: Francisco, Javier and Luis.

1/2 lb wedge.

Title: Winter Blues
Description:
Winter is a time for aged cheeses and a bit of spiciness to counteract the cold and gloom. Enter our award-winning Moo & Blue and Black & Blue. Now for the first time in one sampler, you can enjoy both of our aged cow’s and goat’s milk blues, along with a bar of gingerbread dark chocolate and, to keep things blue-themed, a jar of blueberry pecan jam. Add a bag of our favorite imported Turkish dried apricots, and you’re all set for the winter blizzards! (Mulled wine not included).

1/2lb Black & Blue ~ 1/2lb Moo & Blue ~  Taza Gingerbread Chocolate Bar  ~ 6oz Dried Apricots ~ Terrapin Ridge Farms 5oz Blueberry Bourbon Pecan Jam

Title: American Cheese Month Sampler
Description:
All our cheeses in one box! This is for all the FireFly fans out there, Maryland lovers, and everyone who wants to support artisan American cheese this month. Available only through May 31.

1/2lb Cabra LaMancha ~ 1/2lb Cave Dweller ~ 1 Merry Goat Round ~ 1 Bloomy Breeze ~ 1 Merry Goat Round Spruce Reserve ~ 1/2lb White Rock ~ 1/2lb Black & Blue ~ 1/2lb Moo & Blue ~ 1 log Fresh Goat Cheese ~ 1 MountainTop ~ 1/2lb Carpenter’s Wheel

Due to the seasonal nature of milk production and the small producers we work with, product availability may change. We will make every effort to inform our customers of changes and to substitute high quality products if certain items are not available. If you have any questions about your order, please contact us.

Title: Organic Sourdough Sea Salt Crackers
Description: These crisp, delicious sourdough crackers are perfect for dipping, topping, and pairing with your favorite spreads or snacks. We love them by the handful, with cheese and jam—these toasty, slightly tangy crackers have a way of tasting good with everything. Better yet, they’re made with Regenerative Organic Certified wheat from Washington State that helps build healthy soil, healthy ecosystems and healthy communities. The wheat is milled in Washington, too, creating a short supply chain that supports local farmers and reduces Patagonia’s carbon footprint.

Title: Potter's Organic Winter Wheat Crackers
Description: The perfect vehicle for any cheese we sell. We like these crackers because they’re organic, small batch, and perfectly crispy, with a mild neutral taste of winter wheat. Try with any of our cheeses!

Title: Big Picture Farm Chocolate Covered Goat Milk Caramels
Description: These award winning sea salt and vanilla farmstead goat milk caramels lovingly dipped in organic, fair trade dark chocolate. Winners of a 2015 SILVER SOFI as well as a 2016 GOOD FOOD AWARD. Each caramel is topped with a cocoa butter impression of one of the goats at Big Picture Farm. A little piece of art. 6 pieces in each box, with a storybook pamphlet inside to accompany the drawings on the caramels. A superior gift if there ever was one.

Title: Nat's Nuts Cinnamon Whiskey Pecans
Description: These Cinnamon Whiskey Pecans are made with real whiskey and are roasted to perfection! They start with a soft crunch and finish with the perfect balance of Cinnamon and Whiskey. (All of the alcohol is cooked out of this product). Pairs beautifully with blue cheeses.

Title: Cradoc's Sea Salted Crackers
Description: These are some of our favorite crackers, and they work with all of our cheeses. Crafted by a small, woman-owned company in Wales. Dusted with Halen Mon sea salt, harvested from Anglesey sea water. It doesn’t hurt that they come in a gorgeous box.

Title: Legendary Moo
Description: This limited-edition cow’s milk blue is the result of a partnership with Branch Bender Cidery, our neighbors in Accident. We take our Black & Blue wheels after they’re nearly done aging and soak them in Branch Bender’s Legends cider for a minimum of two months. The result? An incredible piquant blue with a delicate sweetness and appley aroma. A local collaboration rooted in the terroir of our mountain community.

Title: Legendary Blue
Description: This limited-edition goat’s milk blue is the result of a partnership with Branch Bender Cidery, our neighbors in Accident. We take our Black & Blue wheels after they’re nearly done aging and soak them in Branch Bender’s Legends cider for a minimum of two months. The result? An incredible piquant blue with a delicate sweetness and appley aroma. A local collaboration rooted in the terroir of our mountain community.

Title: Shakerag Blue
Description:
Fig-leaf wrapped blue soaked in Tennessee whiskey from Sequatchie Cove Creamery. This cheese takes its name from Shakerag Hollow, a place known for moonshining mischief and a bonanza of spring wildflowers.  Luscious fig leaves are steeped in Chattanooga Whiskey, and hand-wrapped around each wheel of Shakerag Blue. 

1/4 lb wedge.

Title: Green Dirt Prairie Tomme
Description:
Prairie Tomme is a handcrafted, hard sheep cheese, modeled after traditional Paski Sir or Manchego. Made from 100% sheep’s milk at Green Dirt Farm in Weston, MO. Tasting notes: forest floor earthiness, baked milk, vegetable broth. This cheese has won numerous awards over the years, and for good reason! It’s one of the best sheep’s milk cheeses produced in America today.

1/2lb wedge.

Title: Barnacle Foods Spruce Tip Jelly
Description: The perfect pairing for our Spruce Reserve! Or anything else, really. This jelly a sweet, citrusy, and subtly piney preserve made from the tender, bright green new growth of Sitka spruce trees, wild-harvested in spring for their high Vitamin C content

Title: Coffee Blossom Honey
Description: Guatemalan coffee blossom honey. Subtly sweet with lavender notes. Pairs beautifully with coffee, tea, and cheese!

Title: Herdsman
Description:
Herdsman comes to us from award-winning Cherry Grove Farm in Lawrence, NJ. This sustainable farmstead dairy practices rotational grazing on 200 acres of pasture. Herdsman, which is molded in Sicilian incanestrato baskets, is a rustic, natural-rind tomme with a crumbly texture and pleasant acidity. It’s mild-mannered enough, but it still has that raw-milk farmstead intrigue to please serious cheese lovers.

1/4 lb wedge.

Title: Nat's Nuts Vanilla Chai Cashews
Description: Vanilla Chai Cashews made with an authentic in-house spice blend consisting of: cinnamon, ginger, clove, cardamom, black pepper, nutmeg, and star anise. These spices combine with a perfectly toasted cashew to make an unforgettable snack, and the perfect cheese pairing!

Title: Nat's Nuts Maple Bourbon Almonds
Description: Maple Bourbon Almonds – Inspired by a local Maple Farmer who aged syrup in Bourbon Barrels. These make an amazing pairing with aged cheeses like Carpenter’s Wheel!

Title: Cheese Wedge Ornament
Description:
This felt ornament from the Silk Road Bazaar is beautifully crafted with intricate details. Display it year round!

Silk Road Bazaar works with women artisans in Kyrgyzstan to handcraft products using natural fibers and eco-friendly resources. All details are hand stitched and embroidered.

Approximately 5-6 inches in length.

Title: Blake Hill Gooseberry with Elderflower
Description: Elegantly aromatic wild elderflowers foraged from Vermont meadows are infused with tart, Vermont gooseberries to create one of the most beloved jam varieties in the English style. A perfect jam for baked goods, cheesecake, upside-down cake, and vanilla ice cream.

Title: West Virginia Cherry-Jalapeño Pepper Jam
Description: A local jam from our friends at West Virgina Fruit & Berry and a customer favorite, this Cherry-Jalapeño Jam packs just the right level of heat and pairs perfectly with cheese.

Title: Artisan Fruitcake Crisps
Description: Spoil yourself and your cheeses with these sophisticated & traditional fruitcake crisps made with fruits & nuts from Rustic Bakery’s partner family farms.

Title: Father's Day Gift Box
Description:
Delight dad with two of our heartiest cheeses and some amazing products to go with them, hand-picked by our mongers. Our Spruce Reserve and a wedge of Cabra La Mancha are paired with a White Mountain gin salami and wise goat spicy wild-fermented mustard, all served up on Cradoc’s sea salted crackers. A little jar of “Texas bar fight jam” (peaches and whiskey) adds sweetness to this perfect summer gift.
______________________________________________
  • FireFly Farms Spruce Reserve ~ FireFly Farms Cabra La Mancha ~ Cradoc’s Sea Salted Crackers ~ White Mountain Gin Salami ~ Round Rock Jelly & Co. Texas Bar Fight Jam ~ Wise Goat Spicy Wild Fermented Mustard  
  • Wrapping not as pictured. Order by Tuesday, June 13, 11:59pm EST to ensure delivery by Father’s  Day, 06/18. 
  • If one of the items in the collection is unavailable or does not meet our standards, we may need to substitute an item of equal or greater value.

Title: Black & Blue (Pre-cut)
Description: When it comes to beautiful blues, goats are the new cows. Well, not quite, but the playing field has been leveled. Black & Blue’s dense, buttery, and stark white interior is as gorgeous to look at as it is to savor—with exactly the right amount of sweetness, making it appealing to just about any level of blue cheese fan.

Title: Moo & Blue (Pre-cut)
Description: With the deep buttery richness of a classic blue cheese, our all cow’s milk blue isn’t bitter like many blue cheeses can be. There’s a lingering sweetness there and a notably clean flavor. Aged for at least 4 months, it may be unique, but it’s still true blue.

Title: Halloween Sampler
Description:
Get ready to make things spooky and delicious with this fun seasonal sampler! Each box contains everything you need to make a Halloween-themed cheeseboard. Decadent Spruce Reserve, haunting White Rock, and a special wedge of our “Spooky Blue” (cow’s milk Moo & Blue cheese). Pair with gorgeous caramels from Big Picture Farm, pumpkin spice popcorn, and wedges of freshly dipped caramel apples (caramel apple dipping kit included — you provide the apples).

Ships Monday, October 28, unless otherwise specified! (Not available for shipping until mid-October).

1 wheel FireFly Farms Spruce Reserve ~ 1/2 lb FireFly Farms Moo & Blue ~ 1/2lb FireFly Farms White Rock ~ 1 box Big Picture Farm Goat Milk Caramels ~ 1 bag Annie B’s pumpkin spice popcorn ~ 1 Annie B’s caramel apple dipping kit

Title: Mystery Cheese
Description: Let our mongers choose for you! One piece or one 1/2lb wedge of FireFly cheese.

Title: Girl Meets Dirt Rhubarb Lavender Spoon Preserves
Description:
A Good Food Awards 2021 Winner & 2019 Finalist

Deep within Orcas Island’s bucolic Crow Valley, once planted as far as the eye could see in orchard fruit, lies JBS Farm’s gorgeous patch of rhubarb. Girl Meets Dirt selected their deep red Valentine variety for this batch of preserves – lightly infused with garden grown English culinary lavender buds. Supplemented with the best organic rhubarb from a hop and skip from the ferry landing in the fertile Skagit Valley, this jam is the perfect balance of tart and sweet with just a touch of floral.

This deep pink preserve is gorgeous with soft, creamy cow’s milk cheeses, like our Bloomy Breeze, a buttered baguette, or dolloped over ice cream. Is your mouth watering yet?

Title: Huntsman (Long Clawson)
Description:
Long Clawson Huntsman is a premium British cheese produced by Long Clawson Dairy in Leicestershire, featuring layers of creamy, mellow Double Gloucester sandwiched with tangy, sharp Blue Stilton. It’s a firm and smooth, nutty cheese with a contrasting tang of the creamy blue cheese. Not only is it delicious, but the colorful layers make this cheese a great addition to any charcuterie board.

1/2 lb wedge.
